name: hybrid-canonical-project-starter
description: Reusable local continuation scaffold for website projects bootstrapped from the shared workspace agents.
notes: Use this starter when a project root needs its own local DOC system and project-local continuation agents.
The starter package preserves future planning and execution inside the project root.
Shared phase-1 and DOC-system phase-2 agents may attach this package automatically when the target project root is missing or incomplete.
